meaning: n.换毛,脱皮,换毛期v.脱毛,换毛
examples: Like all crustaceans, krill must molt in order to grow.
The results show that the energy metabolism changes during molt cycle.
Rattlesnakes add a segment to their iconic rattles each time they molt.
They shed all their feathers during an annual molt, which the New Zealand penguin had been doing when found.
This particular male has reached his final molt, clear to me because he now has wings to help him get to where the girls are.
